title: Can we use a standard hosted IMAP email service for email-integration, rather than Microsoft Business Premium?
excerpt:
Hi, can we use a standard hosted IMAP email service for email-integration rather than Microsoft Business Premium please? 
That service is expensive licensing for any business with several team members. It’s also a clunky…

posts.author: Forzuna (Kev)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, can we use a standard hosted IMAP email service for email-integration rather than Microsoft Business Premium please?

That service is expensive licensing for any business with several team members. It’s also a clunky migration project if you’re coming from a self-hosted or Microsoft Personal account.

This is a ‘barrier to entry’ to Monday.com.

posts.author: MsquareAutomation (Msquare Automation Solutions)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi there,
Yes, it is possible to use a standard hosted IMAP email service for email integration instead of Microsoft Business Premium such as Google Workspace, Zoho Mail, Rackspace Email ,FastMail.

Consider comparing the pricing, features, and customer reviews of different providers to find the best fit for your organization’s email integration needs.

Hope its help you.

For further implementation details kindly connect us:
MSquare Support
Visit us here
Youtube Channel

posts.author: idodekov (Iliyan Dodekov (Deview Studios))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @Forzuna,

I’m happy to share that there’s a new app in the monday.com marketplace - IMAP Email Connector, that allows you to integrate standard IMAP email accounts.

Key Features

Inbound Email Automations: Automatically create new items or post updates in your monday.com boards when emails arrive in your IMAP inbox. All relevant email content is added as updates to the new item, so your team never misses critical information.

Outbound Email Automations: Set automations to send emails whenever a status changes, or a new item is created. Customize email recipients and content directly from your monday.com board.

Advanced Filtering Options: Use powerful filters to control which emails trigger actions. Filter emails by subject line, body content, or sender to process only the emails that matter most to your team.

Easy IMAP Configuration: Connect your IMAP email account effortlessly. Customize server settings for both IMAP and SMTP to meet your specific needs.

If you need help setting this up, feel free to contact us at: support@deview-studios.com

posts.author: alltordnarsig (Anna C)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi! You are too expensive. Otherwise I would happily use your service. But I easily get up to over 250 emails a month and am not interested to pay so much for that on top of Monday.com charges - and everything else that comes with this. For a service that should work. Just so you know. But good that someone created a solution! Cheers, Anna
